label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes LogList HighSecurity column 0x05 to value 2 and returns SUCCESS. The provided LogList table defines HighSecurity as boolean, and the boolean type has valid integer range 0 to 1 only, so SUCCESS for value 2 is not protocol-compliant.
concerns: This review only rejects SUCCESS for the out-of-range boolean value; it does not infer the exact non-success status that should have been returned.
